facts.label: THE OMAN BREAKTHROUGH
facts.story: On October 7, 2001, in Shenyang, midfielder Yu Genwei scored in the 36th minute to beat Oman 1–0, and the final whistle at 21:21 ended a wait that had lasted since China's first failed qualifying bid in 1957. Serbian coach Bora Milutinović — already a veteran of leading five different nations to World Cups — had steered China through a golden qualifying group. Fans who'd endured 44 years of near-misses finally had their ticket to Japan and South Korea.

facts.label: RED FOR THE DRAGON TEAM
facts.story: China's players are nicknamed the 'Dragon Team,' and their kit has echoed that identity for decades: home shirts overwhelmingly red with white or yellow trim, an inverted white-and-red change strip on the road. Adidas supplied the 2002 kit, the last World Cup shirt China has worn — the team hasn't qualified since, meaning that red jersey remains the only one to represent the country on football's biggest stage.

2002.headline: Forty-Four Years, Zero Goals

annotations.label: A RESPECTABLE OPENER
annotations.story: China's World Cup history began in Gwangju with genuine resistance — they matched Costa Rica for long stretches before Ronald Gomez broke through in the 61st minute and Mauricio Wright doubled it four minutes later. The 0–2 scoreline was the closest China came to an upset in three matches.

annotations.label: BRAZIL'S FIRST-HALF STORM
annotations.story: Roberto Carlos opened the scoring in the 15th minute in Seogwipo, and by halftime Rivaldo and a Ronaldinho penalty had made it three. Ronaldo added a fourth after the break. The eventual champions cruised; China, overwhelmed, never threatened a reply in front of 36,750 fans.

annotations.label: SENT OFF, SHUT OUT
annotations.story: Hasan Şaş and Bülent Korkmaz staked Turkey to a 2–0 lead inside nine minutes in Seoul. China's Shao Jiayi was sent off in the 58th minute, and Ümit Davala's goal five minutes from time completed a 3–0 defeat — closing out a tournament in which China never scored.

2002.homeColors: red shirt with white trim, red shorts (Adidas)
